candidatePredecessor.rationale: Only version carrying BOTH prior corrections (TAPER phase-family fix from v2, and the corrected peak-volume-policy-bearing RulePack v2). v1 has neither fix; v2 has only the TAPER fix.

dependencyRetirementRationale: Nothing in the retirement/publish pipeline requires a dependency to be retired merely because its only combination consumer is; they remain readable historical artifacts (Decision E). Smallest appropriate action.

retirementLedgerPreChangeSnapshot.note: Confirmed absent both before and after Part 2 (ActiveVersionPreparationTests.RealCatalogRetirementPlan_IsGeneratedButNotExecuted).

expectedFullCatalogBundleListAfterRetire.otherArtifactTypes: unchanged -- all non-combination artifact types continue to be republished individually regardless of combination retirement, per brief §15 full-catalog-packaging design

rollbackProcedure: If a retire CLI call fails partway: ledger is additive JSON, remove/re-run missing entries; no release touched yet.

If publish 0.6.0-pilot fails validation: CatalogPublisher.Publish never calls WriteRelease until every validation stage passes -- no partial release directory is ever written. Fix and re-run; no ledger rollback needed.

If publish succeeds but verify-release fails: do NOT delete/edit the release directory; do NOT supersede 0.5.0-pilot; fix forward with a new corrected release (e.g. 0.6.1-pilot), never retroactively alter 0.6.0-pilot.
In all cases: 0.5.0-pilot and every earlier release remain untouched and continue to verify.
